keyPoints: A - All data points are included in calculating the sample mean for each class or group
M - Mean is calculated using the sum of all values divided by the number of values
A - Average is often denoted by the Greek letter mu (μ)
Z - Zero bias is not a concern when calculating the sample mean for each class
E - Every data point contributes to the calculation
M - Mathematical operations are necessary to arrive at the final mean value
O - Obtain the mean by dividing the sum of the values by the count of values
M - Measuring central tendency is essential in statistics
